Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Beaky and the Eggsnatchers.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0740 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Beaky and the Eggsnatchers.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0740 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
